# Nexus0.5 Execution Proof Run Pack Overview Reference

Source: NEXUS0.5 docs architecture donor file.
Status: adapted reference.

## Donor Proof Pattern
Run a full objective loop after execution layer install and verify real artifact generation.

## Fresh Nexus Use
Use as a proof strategy template only:
- objective-driven run
- concrete artifact expectation
- explicit result status
- no donor authority inheritance
